description: Fisher information scalar curvature |R| for the 3D Heisenberg model on L x L x L periodic cubic torus at beta_c

data.note: Same-campaign as L=9 (both H100). d_eff(9->10) = 1.000 +/- 0.035 (0.5 sigma from target 1.017). PRIMARY for methodological consistency.
Independent campaign on different hardware. d_eff(9->10) = 0.954 +/- 0.041 (1.5 sigma from target). Cross-campaign with L=9 (H100).

notes.method_detail: Wolff cluster algorithm with FFT-accelerated Fisher matrix computation, 1M total samples with jackknife error estimation
notes.d_eff_definition: d_eff(L1 -> L2) = log(|R(L2)|/|R(L1)|) / log(n2/n1), where n = L^3
notes.d_eff_uncertainty: Gaussian propagation from individual JK standard errors: sigma_d_eff = sqrt((dR2/R2)^2 + (dR1/R1)^2) / log(n2/n1). Conservative (ignores inter-L correlations within same campaign).
notes.primary_choice: Same-campaign (H100) d_eff used in Paper #10 tables for methodological purity. Cross-campaign reported as independent check.
notes.stale_value_warning: d_eff = 1.013 appearing in earlier versions used preliminary R = 3682 (not the final H100 value 3667).
notes.compute: L=4-8 on RTX 4090 (local); L=9 on RunPod H100; L=10 on RunPod H100 (9/10 JK) and RunPod A100 (10/10 JK)

papers: Paper #7: Curvature & Vacuum Einstein (submitted, on hold)
